creator: rnoland@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have a new patch for HEAD which I think may fix this correctly.
http://people.freebsd.org/~rnoland/drm_scatter2.patch 

It *might* apply to 7 as well, but I haven't tested that.  I'll be
committing it to HEAD shortly and adding it to my list of stuff to MFC
after 7.1 is released.  If possible, give it a shot.

robert.
